questions.statement:
<p><strong>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.&nbsp;</strong></p>

<p>Flat</p>

<p><strong>Choose the correct antonym (word with opposite meaning).</strong></p>

<p>Continue</p>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;"><u>Direction</u>: Given below is a sentence with the underlined word followed by four words. Select the option that is opposite in meaning to the underlined word and mark your response accordingly.</span></p>

<p>the students were <u>objurgated </u>by the faculty for not completing the project on time.</p>
Which of the given options is a perfect one word for &quot; <strong>a poem or song of fourteen deca-syllabic lines that are iambic pentameters</strong>&quot;?

<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</p>

<p>Extravagance</p>

<p><strong>Select the option that gives the most appropriate meaning of the underlined word.</strong></p>

<p>We found that birch <u>bark</u> could serve as paper.</p>
options: the hard outer covering of a tree /
utter (a command or question) abruptly or aggressively /

questions.statement:
<p><span class="ng-binding"><strong>Directions: In the following question, four alternatives are given for the idiom/phrase underlined in the sentence. Choose the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the idiom/phrase.</strong></span></p>

<p>Despite the attention-grabbing headlines in the media, the CFDP Progress Report released two weeks ago has <u>a very different story to tell</u>.</p>
options: <span class="ILfuVd" lang="en"><span class="hgKElc">To provide information that differs from what someone else has said.</span></span> /
A lie told to avoid making somebody upset. /
A sudden or complete change of policy or opinion /
Forming a situation in which the concerns of two different parties are incompatible. /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the most appropriate synonym of the given word.</p>

<p>Faithful</p>

<p><strong>Select the option which means the same as the group of words given.</strong></p>

<p>Animals that live in water</p>
